</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Eflornithine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of facial hirsutism in women.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>esotropia（99.8%）</li>
<li>neurotrophic keratopathy（99.4%）</li>
<li>congenital analbuminemia（98.9%）</li>
<li>hyperamylasemia（98.8%）</li>
<li>polyclonal hyperviscosity syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>human African trypanosomiasis（98.6%）</li>
<li>trypanosomiasis, bovine（98.4%）</li>
<li>blood group incompatibility（98.4%）</li>
<li>monoclonal gammopathy（98.2%）</li>
<li>premalignant hematological system disease（98.1%）</li>
<li>congenital prothrombin deficiency（98.0%）</li>
<li>metabolic disease associated with ocular features（98.0%）</li>
<li>congenital hematological disorder（97.9%）</li>
<li>nutritional biotin deficiency（97.9%）</li>
<li>bullous impetigo（97.8%）</li>
<li>hematological disease associated with an acquired peripheral neuropathy（97.7%）</li>
<li>reticular dysgenesis（97.7%）</li>
<li>lung fibrosis-immunodeficiency-46,XX gonadal dysgenesis syndrome（97.4%）</li>
<li>Immunoerythromyeloid hypoplasia（97.2%）</li>
<li>adenosine deaminase deficiency（97.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
